AI Mail Gateway

Telegram & WhatsApp AI agent for Odoo Community

Companion Odoo addon for OdooPilot — the open-source AI messaging bridge that lets your team query and act on Odoo data from Telegram in plain language.

  • Link employees' Telegram accounts to their Odoo users in one click.
  • Configure the OdooPilot service URL and enable channels from Odoo Settings.
  • View a full audit log of every AI action taken on behalf of each user.

View on GitHub →
